description: Document that tells the story of Aharon ha-Levi and Ḥalfon, who collected money on behalf of the Rambam (Maimonides) for ransom of captives. They sent the Rambam a list of names and amounts of money which people agreed to pay, from the Jewish community in al-Mahalla. One of the community members sold his female slave and gave nine dinars of the payment to the Rambam's messenger. On the other side Moses Maimonides declares that he received the money. Av-Elul 1170. (Goitein, Palestinian Jewry, 316-318) VMR
tags: Maimonides autograph, al-Mahalla, ransom, captives, communal, legal, bara'a, slave
description_he: מסמך על אהרן הלוי וחלפון שגבו כסף בשם הרמב"ם לפדיון שבויים מקהילת המחלה. אחד מבני הקהילה מכר שפחתו ותרם 9 דינר. הרמב"ם מאשר קבלת הכסף. אב-אלול 1170.
